query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?

retrieved_nodes.preview: You can't cast another spell during the same turn, except for a cantrip with a casting time of 1 action.
You must use a bonus action on your turn to cast the spell, provided that you haven't already taken a bonus action this turn.
You can transform unexpended sorcery points into one spell slot as a bonus action on your turn.
You can take a bonus action only when a special ability, spell, or other feature of the game states that you can do something as a bonus action.
For example, if you take the Attack action and attack with a quarterstaff, you can also make an unarmed strike as a bonus action, assuming you haven't already taken a bonus action this turn.
Some characters and monsters have special abilities that let them cast spells without using spell slots.
For example, if two clerics cast *bless* on the same target, that character gains the spell's benefit only once; he or she doesn't get to roll two bonus dice.
You can take only one bonus action on your turn, so you must choose which bonus action to use when you have more than one available.
You can cast your arcanum spell once without expending a spell slot.
You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless otherwise noted.

answer: No, according to the provided rules, you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features. The rules state that you can't cast another spell during the same turn, except for a cantrip with a casting time of 1 action, and taking the Attack action requires a separate action.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is relevant and mostly correct, but it introduces some unnecessary complexity regarding casting a cantrip. The core information about not being able to cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without special features is accurate.
